item.title:
Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 27min The talking is over. The action can finally begin.
And there’s one big question on
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 27min The talking is over. The action can finally begin.
And there’s one big question on everyone’s mind here…
Can @philhaigh_ defend his Media World Championship title?
The draw is coming up later, live on Atlantic 252.
#Snooker 1 9 262

item.title:

item.description:
